title: AI Image AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Retro-modern studio fashion advertisement for Autumn City Texture collection. Model Group: four diverse adult models in a connected group pose, arranged as a cohesive adult fashion campaign group. Wardrobe: brown tweed blazer, burgundy turtleneck, check trousers, camel coat, mustard knit, and dark loafers, each look distinct but part of the same collection. Set Design: monochromatic teal-grey #506D6D architectural backdrop with fluted column and stepped circular platforms. Pose Relationship: two models holding hands, one seated on platform, one standing tall with relaxed smile, balanced spacing and natural interpersonal rhythm. Lighting: professionally diffused studio light with soft depth shadows, soft graduated shadows and clean product/fabric detail. Camera: Wide-angle studio fashion ad, polished editorial realism, crisp textures. Restrictions: Adult models only, no real brand logos, no merged bodies, no distorted limbs, no stiff catalog feel, no random text.
